name: Treasure Detour
description: The cartographer maps efficiently but the greedy one keeps diverting the party toward loot.

name: Going Separate Ways
description: Constant friction. The party inevitably splits — the speed runner races ahead while the paranoid one refuses to move.

name: The Noble Sacrifice
description: The martyr taunts everything. The coward uses the distraction to flee with perfect knowledge of the dungeon.

name: Complete Paralysis
description: One charges forward, one refuses to follow. The party loops the same argument until something forces a decision.

name: The Treasure Rush
description: Both sprint toward loot with zero caution. Statistically the most entertaining party to watch die.

name: Wrong Game
description: The completionist stops at every room. The speed runner keeps looping back in frustration.

name: Sacrifice and Salvage
description: The martyr taunts everything. The vulture waits, then loots the corpses afterward.

name: Cascade Failure
description: If the leader dies, the traumatized one's panic-flee triggers a chain reaction — the whole party scatters with full intel.

name: Scout And Run
description: The solo scout splits off, the coward flees on first contact. Whatever rooms they reached come back as intel by tomorrow.

name: Believer's Boost
description: The fan's enthusiasm fuels the underdog. XP gains stack absurdly fast — they leave the run dangerously stronger than they arrived.

name: Survivor's Burden
description: When things go bad, the loyal one drags the traumatized survivor out — both escape with full knowledge of the dungeon.

name: Defection Plague
description: Tamers convert the living, necromancers conscript the dead. Your minion roster bleeds from both ends.
